title: Golden Hour Realistic Portrait
prompt: Photorealistic mid-length portrait of a young adult in golden hour sunlight. Soft, warm rim and frontal fill light, natural makeup, visible skin texture and hair detail, shallow depth of field (85mm), cinematic color grading with warm highlights and natural shadows, high-resolution, sharp focus on eyes with gentle bokeh background, modern lifestyle aesthetic.
negativePrompt: overprocessed, unnatural skin, heavy filters, blur
